credentials: PHD 2018 Univ of California Los Angeles
name: RAFAEL RAMIREZ MENDOZA

ratings.comment: Rafa was so fun to have! His classes were always super interesting. Only gripe I have was the weekly discussion posts were super long but low-key not bad

Rafa was an amazing spanish professor! He's super easy to understand as long as you know a decent amount of spanish and the course content is clearly communicated. As long as you participate and turn in your homework, it should be easy to get an A!
